result.stdout:
USAGE: tktstats [--help] command [<options>]

COMMANDS:

    list            Get a list changes in number of ticket by date and status
    cumulative      Get a cumulative changes by date and status

OPTIONS:

    --help            display this list of options

commands.payload:
USAGE: tktstats [--help] command [<options>]

COMMANDS:

    list            Get a list changes in number of ticket by date and status
    cumulative      Get a cumulative changes by date and status

OPTIONS:

    --help            display this list of options

result.stdout:
USAGE: tktstats cumulative [--status] [--mode] [--help]
Get a cumulative changes by date and status

OPTIONS:

    --status          A list of the status values to include.  e.g. New,Done (String)
    --mode             (Table|Chart)
    --help            display this list of options
